error_signature: the n8n.cloud app did not complete the Google verification process
title: Google verification process not completed for n8n.cloud app
symptom: When attempting to connect to Google Sheets, the user receives an error stating 'the n8n.cloud app did not complete the Google verification process'.
applies_when: Trying to authenticate with Google account
not_this_if: The app has been published in Google Cloud console
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n application registered with Google is not publicly available. Google requires applications to be verified and published for general use, or to have specific test users added for authentication.
fix_steps: Go to the Google Cloud console at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials/consent
Add the Google user as a 'test' user in the respective section
Retry the authentication process with the added test user
agent_instruction: Add the Google user as a test user in the Google Cloud console to allow authentication.
